tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab][Intro]
 [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]E9[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
|- --- ----|- ---    ----|[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]E9[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
|- --- ----|Baby, you can|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
find me under the lights[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
Diamonds under my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Turn the rhythm up, don't you wanna just[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
come along for the ride?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Ooh, my outfit's so tight[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E7[/ch]
You can see my heart beat tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
I can take the heat, baby, best believe[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
That's the moment I shine[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]                                [ch]E7[/ch]
'Cause every romance shakes and it bends, don't give a damn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                      [ch]E7[/ch]
When the night's here, I don't do tears, baby, no chance[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I could dance, I could dance, I could dance[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Watch me dance, dance the night away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
My hеart could be burning but you won't see it in my face[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Watch me dancе, dance the night away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
I still keep the party running, not one hair out of place[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Lately I've been moving close to the edge[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
Still be looking my best[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
I stay on the beat, you can count on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
I ain't missing no steps[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]                                [ch]E7[/ch]
'Cause every romance shakes and it bends, don't give a damn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                      [ch]E7[/ch]
When the night's here, I don't do tears, baby, no chance[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I could dance, I could dance, I could dance[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Watch me dance, dance the night away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
My hеart could be burning but you won't see it in my face[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
I still keep the party running, not one hair out of place[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]E7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
When my heart breaks (They'll never see it, never see it)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]E7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Gmaj13[/ch]
